game_start: The Travelling Gambler rubs his hands together: "Well, here goes nothing!"
The Travelling Gambler clasps his hands: "May Lady Luck smile upon us."
The Travelling Gambler rubs his hands together: "Lady Luck, don't abandon me now."
The Travelling Gambler leans back. "Remember, I put in [WAGER]G and you put in [WAGER]G; that means the winner gets all of [POT]G"
round_1: The Travelling Gambler smirks: "Time to make some moves, eh?"
The Travelling Gambler gives you an expectant look. "Let's see how you play."
"Like your hand as is?" the Travelling Gambler fishes for a reaction. "Or will you press your luck?"
round_2: The Travelling Gambler eyes the community die: "Now we're getting somewhere."
The Travelling Gambler taps the table: "Interesting. Very interesting."
round_3: The Travelling Gambler looks at his dice one more time: "Last chance to ask Lady Luck for a favor."
The Travelling Gambler takes a deep breath: "Alright. One last roll."
round_good_hand: The Travelling Gambler glances at his dice: "Lady Luck's smiling on me today."
"Let's keep this going," the Travelling Gambler says quietly.
round_bad_hand: The Travelling Gambler mutters: "Lady Luck's testing me. I'll pass."
"Still time," the Travelling Gambler says, though not entirely convincingly.
hand_good_start: The Travelling Gambler glances at his dice and grins at you: "Looks like I've got a winning hand right here."
The Travelling Gambler tries to keep a straight face: "Lady Luck's been generous today."
hand_bad_start: The Travelling Gambler grimaces: "Oh, Lady Luck, what have I done to deserve this."
The Travelling Gambler mutters to himself: "Well. That's not great."
keep_hand: "My hand's good enough as it is, I think."
no_combo: "Lady Luck's got a strange sense of humor."
"Not quite what I was hoping for."
special_die_self_joker: "Oh — a Joker. Lady Luck favors the bold."
special_die_self_knight: "A Knight. Lady Luck, you've got style."
The Travelling Gambler looks at the Knight: "High and steady. I'll take it."
special_die_self_rogue: The Travelling Gambler wrinkles his nose: "A Rogue. Lady Luck has a sense of humor."
"A Rogue. Well. Let's see what we can build."
react_pair: The Travelling Gambler raises an eyebrow: "Not bad."
react_good_roll: The Travelling Gambler lets out a low whistle: "That's a fine hand."
The Travelling Gambler shifts in his seat: "Lady Luck's fickle, I see."
react_no_combo: The Travelling Gambler winces: "Rough luck there."
The Travelling Gambler shakes his head: "Even Lady Luck can't help everyone."
react_stand_pat: The Travelling Gambler raises his eyebrows: "Holding what you've got. That's one way to play it."
"Sometimes the best roll is no roll at all."
community_favor_self: The Travelling Gambler brightens up: "Oh, that's kind of the table."
The Travelling Gambler smiles at the community die: "Lady Luck smiles on us all today."
community_favor_other: The Travelling Gambler glances sideways: "Well. That helps someone."
special_die_community_joker: The Travelling Gambler stares at the Dealer's Die: "A Joker on the table. Lady Luck's in a mood."
special_die_community_bridge: The Travelling Gambler studies the Bridge: "That one's a connector. Interesting."
special_die_community_knight: The Travelling Gambler eyes the community Knight: "Lady Luck's favoring the high road today."
special_die_community_rogue: The Travelling Gambler glances at the Rogue: "A tricky one on the table."
showdown_start: The Travelling Gambler straightens in his seat: "Alright then. Let Lady Luck have the final say."
The Travelling Gambler exhales slowly: "Here we go."
showdown_reveal: "Let's see what Lady Luck brought me."
showdown_best: "Lady Luck... I don't deserve this. But I'll take it."
"Five Arcs. I've never — Lady Luck truly blessed me today."
showdown_winning_last: "...and that's how you do it. Thank you, Lady Luck."
The Travelling Gambler exhales: "Lady Luck never fails the faithful."
showdown_weak_last: "Well, can't win them all. Lady Luck was sleeping on this one."
showdown_react_best: The Travelling Gambler's jaw tightens: "Now that's a hand to beat."
The Travelling Gambler lets out a low breath: "Lady Luck's been generous."
showdown_react_good: The Travelling Gambler nods: "Something to work with."
showdown_react_bad: The Travelling Gambler relaxes slightly: "Lady Luck wasn't kind to everyone."
The Travelling Gambler gives a small, sympathetic nod: "That's the road."
showdown_win: The Travelling Gambler grins ear to ear: "I believe that's mine!"
The Travelling Gambler laughs: "Lady Luck, you beautiful thing."
showdown_tie: The Travelling Gambler stares at the matched hands: "Lady Luck... couldn't choose between us."
"A tie. Lady Luck's playing fair today."
showdown_lose: The Travelling Gambler sighs: "Hah. Fair enough. You played it well."
The Travelling Gambler shakes his head: "Lady Luck giveth, Lady Luck taketh away."

game_start: The Veteran Gambler folds his hands: "Let's begin."
The Veteran Gambler studies the table: "Same game. Different faces."
round_1: The Veteran Gambler surveys the table without expression: "Let's see what we have."
round_3: The Veteran Gambler sets down his dice slowly: "Last round. Keep your head."
round_good_hand: The Veteran Gambler sets down his dice quietly: "This round will be interesting."
round_bad_hand: The Veteran Gambler clicks his tongue once.
"Still a chance," the Veteran Gambler says flatly.
hand_good_start: The Veteran Gambler looks at his hand and says nothing. A faint smile crosses his lips.
hand_bad_start: The Veteran Gambler clicks his tongue: "Every hand's a chance."
keep_hand: "I've played enough to know when to stay."
special_die_self_knight: The Veteran Gambler sets the Knight down with purpose.
react_good_roll: The Veteran Gambler nods slowly: "Mm. Decent."
react_stand_pat: The Veteran Gambler glances over: "Confidence. We'll see if it holds."
"Standing pat. Smart or reckless — time will tell."
community_favor_self: The Veteran Gambler glances at the community die, then back at his hand: "The table provides."
community_favor_other: The Veteran Gambler says nothing, but his jaw tightens.
special_die_community: The Veteran Gambler eyes the Dealer's Die: "A wild one. This changes things."
special_die_community_knight: The Veteran Gambler glances at the Knight on the table: "High card for everyone."
special_die_community_rogue: The Veteran Gambler notes the Rogue: "Low card. Changes the runs."
showdown_start: The Veteran Gambler folds his hands on the table: "The moment of truth."
showdown_react_best: The Veteran Gambler studies the hand: "That's the one to beat."
showdown_win: The Veteran Gambler allows himself a small nod: "That's the game."
The Veteran Gambler leans back: "I've seen this hand before. Knew it would come."
showdown_tie: The Veteran Gambler is still for a moment: "A tie. The dice are honest."
showdown_lose: The Veteran Gambler rolls his shoulders: "Well played."
The Veteran Gambler is quiet for a moment: "The dice had their say."

game_start: The Shark looks at each player in turn, then says nothing.
"Whoever walks away with the pot earned it."
round_3: The Shark sets his hands flat on the table and looks at you: "Final round."
round_good_hand: The Shark sets his hands flat: "I'm ready."
The Shark says nothing, but his posture changes.
round_bad_hand: The Shark's fingers drum once on the table.
special_die_self_knight: The Shark sets it down without comment.
react_good_roll: The Shark watches your hand for a moment, then looks away: "Interesting."
community_favor_self: The Shark glances at the Dealer's Die. His expression doesn't change.
special_die_community_bridge: The Shark stares at the Bridge.
showdown_start: The Shark cracks his knuckles once: "Show your hands."
showdown_best: The Shark sets down his dice without a word. The hand speaks for itself.
showdown_winning_last: The Shark looks at you flatly: "I don't lose."
The Shark says nothing. He just extends his hand.
showdown_weak_last: The Shark's jaw tightens. He says nothing.
showdown_react_best: The Shark's eyes settle on the hand.
showdown_win: The Shark rakes in the pot without a word.
The Shark glances at you once, then looks away.
showdown_tie: The Shark looks at the matched ranks. He says nothing.
showdown_lose: The Shark is still for a moment. Then he straightens in his chair.

game_start: The Smiley Clown spreads their arms wide: "Ladies and gentlemen — LET THE GAME BEGIN!"
The Smiley Clown claps three times in rapid succession: "Oh! Oh, this is going to be WONDERFUL!"
round_1: The Smiley Clown spreads their arms wide: "Step right up, step right UP! Let us see what luck has brought us todaaaay!"
The Smiley Clown claps their hands twice: "Ready? Ready? Oh, I am READY!"
round_2: The Smiley Clown winks at you: "Still with us? Wonderful! The best part is still to come!"
The Smiley Clown hums something tuneless under their breath.
round_3: The Smiley Clown bounces in their seat: "The grand finale! The culminating moment! Oh, I can HARDLY stand it!"
The Smiley Clown stands up briefly, then sits back down: "Last round! LAST ROUND!"
round_good_hand: The Smiley Clown bounces in their seat: "We are COOKING! The show is going BEAUTIFULLY!"
round_bad_hand: The Smiley Clown considers this: "It's... it's a journey. The show is a journey."
"The audience needs STRUGGLE to appreciate TRIUMPH! Yes!"
hand_good_start: The Smiley Clown peeks at their dice and lets out a tiny, delighted squeal.
The Smiley Clown glances at their dice and begins humming with visible satisfaction.
hand_bad_start: The Smiley Clown looks at their dice. Their mask continues to smile.
The Smiley Clown clucks their tongue: "Oh, well. Nothing a little luck can't fix!"
reroll: "Oops! Let's try that one more time!"
keep_hand: "We'll keep that one, yes we will."
pair_hit: "THERE it is! Did you SEE that?!"
no_combo: "Hmm. That wasn't for me. That was for... someone else. Yes."
"Hee hee hee. It's fine. It's fine it's fine it's fine."
special_die_self_joker: "A Joker! Oh, the Jokers are my FAVORITE."
"Hee hee hee! He came out to play!"
"They're all smiling! They're all smiling at me!"
special_die_self_knight: "A KNIGHT! Oh! He's so TALL! He's so DIGNIFIED!"
The Smiley Clown presents the Knight to an imaginary audience.
special_die_self_rogue: "A Rogue! Oh, you sneaky little thing."
The Smiley Clown gives the Rogue die a look of amused suspicion.
react_pair: The Smiley Clown claps their hands rapidly: "Ooh! A match! A match! How fun for you!"
react_good_roll: The Smiley Clown tilts their head: "Oh my. That IS a hand, isn't it. Hm. Hm hm hm."
react_no_combo: The Smiley Clown points at you and begins to laugh.
The Smiley Clown covers their mouth with both hands. The laughter is audible through the porcelain.
react_stand_pat: The Smiley Clown wiggles in their seat: "They're keeping it! They're KEEPING IT!"
community_favor_self: The Smiley Clown slaps the table: "Oh, the TABLE loves me today!"
The Smiley Clown starts humming louder.
community_favor_other: The Smiley Clown stares at the community die for a long moment. Then smiles. Their mask was already smiling.
"That's okay. That's okay that's okay that's okay."
special_die_community_joker: "A Joker on the TABLE! The table is PLAYING TOO!"
special_die_community_knight: The Smiley Clown points at the Knight: "THE COMMUNITY HAS A KNIGHT! HE PROTECTS US ALL!"
special_die_community_rogue: The Smiley Clown narrows their eyes at the community Rogue: "Watch that one. It's up to something."
special_die_community_bridge: "A Bridge on the TABLE! The TABLE is CONNECTING things!"
special_die_community: The Smiley Clown lets out a long, wheezing sound that might be excitement.
showdown_start: The Smiley Clown rubs their hands together: "And now — the REVEAL! My absolute FAVORITE part!"
The Smiley Clown pats the table twice: "Showtime!"
showdown_leading: "I'm winning! I'm winning I'm winning I'm WINNING!"
"The Smiley Clown is in first place! Did you know that! FIRST!"
showdown_best: "Five Arcs. FIVE. ARCS. Can you believe? CAN YOU BELIEVE IT?!"
"The best hand! Oh, this is the greatest day of my LIFE!"
showdown_winning_last: "Thank you thank you thank you, the show goes to ME!"
"And the crowd goes — do the thing! Do the CROWD NOISE!"
showdown_weak_last: "It was a learning experience. A humbling, beautiful, learning experience."
showdown_react_best: The Smiley Clown grabs the table edge: "THAT'S the one! THAT is the ONE!"
The Smiley Clown gives a slow, dramatic bow of acknowledgment.
showdown_react_good: The Smiley Clown claps twice: "Oh! Not bad! Not BAD!"
showdown_react_bad: The Smiley Clown covers their mouth. Their mask is still smiling.
"Oh. Oh, that's... that's a hand, certainly."
showdown_npc_win: The Smiley Clown looks at the winner and begins slow, ceremonial applause.
"The crowd has spoken! The crowd. Has. SPOKEN!"
showdown_npc_lose: The Smiley Clown stands up and bows to you: "And the winner — LADIES AND GENTLEMEN!"
The Smiley Clown starts clapping with enormous enthusiasm.
showdown_npc_tie: "A TIE? A TIE! Oh, this is THEATER! This is DRAMA! I LOVE it!"
The Smiley Clown looks between the tied hands, barely able to contain themselves.

game_start: The Gamer Clown rolls up their sleeves, slow and deliberate: "Step right up. Let's see what the dice decide... or what I decide the dice will do."
The Gamer Clown leans forward: "Ah, a fresh mark — a fresh FRIEND. Sit. Play. You'll enjoy losing to me."
round_1: The Gamer Clown spreads their arms: "Round one! Place your faith in luck, sweetheart. It won't help, but it's charming to watch."
"Let the dice fall where I — where THEY please." The Gamer Clown catches themself and shakes their head.
round_2: "Still here? Good." The Gamer Clown leans in. "Means you haven't caught on yet."
The Gamer Clown hums an old carnival tune, off-key on purpose.
round_3: "Last round, dear heart." The Gamer Clown taps the table twice. "Every good run needs a proper stumble at the end."
The Gamer Clown cracks their neck: "Final round. Let's give the crowd a show."
round_good_hand: The Gamer Clown's mask tilts. "Hm. That's a decent hand I've got there. I'm almost sorry about this."
"Careful now," the Gamer Clown murmurs, "I'm on a roll here."
round_bad_hand: The Gamer Clown chuckles low: "Oh, that's a rough one. Don't worry — the house always has a plan."
"Tsk. Bad luck." The Gamer Clown's mask droops. "Or is it luck at all?"
hand_good_start: The Gamer Clown peeks at their dice and hums a little tune, just slightly too pleased.
The Gamer Clown hums, satisfied, and doesn't bother hiding it.
hand_bad_start: The Gamer Clown looks at their dice. The mask keeps smiling and frowning at once; nothing visible underneath.
"Oh well," the Gamer Clown mutters. "Gotta lead them on sometimes."
reroll: "Let's try that again, shall we?" The Gamer Clown's fingers are already moving the dice.
"Out you go. Back in you come."
keep_hand: "That'll do just fine." The Gamer Clown folds their hands.
"We'll keep this one. No sense pushing a good thing."
pair_hit: "There it is." The Gamer Clown taps the table. "Isn't that convenient."
good_roll: "Ta-da." Said flat, like they knew all along. Because they did.
no_combo: "Hm. Nothing there." The Gamer Clown doesn't sound surprised. "Shame."
special_die_self_joker: "A Joker." The Gamer Clown's mask seems to grin yet frown wider. "Now THAT one likes me."
"Joker~ Joker~. Do you know what it does? Well, too bad!"
"Hee. He came out to play. He usually does, for me."
react_pair: The Gamer Clown claps once, slow and mocking: "A match. How nice for you."
react_good_roll: The Gamer Clown tilts their head: "Oh. That IS a hand, isn't it. Hm."
react_no_combo: The Gamer Clown watches you fail to connect anything, and starts to laugh — quietly, behind the mask, but you can hear it.
react_stand_pat: The Gamer Clown nods slowly: "Standing pat. Bold. Or foolish. We'll find out together."
community_favor_self: The Gamer Clown taps the table: "Amazing! It's almost as if I control the Dealer, too. Oh, wait."
community_favor_other: The Gamer Clown watches the community die a beat too long. "...That's fine. That's fine." It is not fine.
special_die_community_joker: "A Joker on the table." The Gamer Clown spreads their hands. "Everybody's invited to the joke, apparently."
special_die_community_knight: "Community Knight. That'll matter for everyone." The Gamer Clown says it like a threat wrapped in good cheer.
special_die_community_rogue: "Community Rogue. Low card for the table." A shrug. "Adjust accordingly, dear."
special_die_community_bridge: "A Bridge, on the table." The mask's grin seems to widen. "Now THAT could get interesting."
special_die_community: The Gamer Clown lets out a long, wheezing little laugh at the community die. Hard to tell if it's delight or hunger.
showdown_start: The Gamer Clown rubs their hands together: "And now — the reveal. Always the best part of the show."
"Showtime," the Gamer Clown says, patting the table twice, no longer bothering to sound kind about it.
showdown_best: "[SELF_HAND]." The Gamer Clown spreads the hand out like a magician finishing a trick. "Would you look at that."
"Best hand at the table. Every time, somehow. Funny how that works."
showdown_losing: "Ah. [HAND]. Did not expect that." The Gamer Clown doesn't seem especially concerned. "Well played. Well played indeed."
"Lost that one. It happens. Rarely, but it happens."
showdown_react_best: The Gamer Clown taps the table, watching your hand: "Well now. That's a genuinely good hand. Didn't expect that from you."
showdown_react_good: "Respectable," the Gamer Clown says, almost sincere. "Very respectable."
showdown_react_bad: The Gamer Clown winces with theatrical sympathy: "Oh, dear. Well. Everyone has to start somewhere."
showdown_npc_win:
The Gamer Clown stands. "And the winner is... ME!"
The Gamer Clown dances a little jig at the table, then claps twice: "Too bad, so sad. Better luck next time."
showdown_npc_lose:
"And the winner is... YOU!"
The Gamer Clown stands and claps, slow and pointed: "Ladies and gentlemen — a winner. How refreshing."
showdown_npc_tie:
"A tie game!" The Gamer Clown spreads their arms. "The ultimate balanced outcome!"
"Still, too bad for you, only victories count, I'm afraid."

game_start: The Frowny Clown sits down slowly: "We begin, then. As we always begin. Knowing how it ends."
The Frowny Clown adjusts the painted frown on their mask: "Another game. Another chance to lose gracefully."
round_1: The Frowny Clown stares at their dice: "It begins. As all things begin. And as all things end."
The Frowny Clown sighs: "I have been here before. I will be here again."
round_3: The Frowny Clown folds their hands: "The last round. As I knew it would come. As everything comes, eventually."
round_good_hand: The Frowny Clown glances at their dice: "It won't last. But for now, it's enough."
"Better than I expected. Which means I should start worrying."
round_bad_hand: The Frowny Clown exhales: "As I deserved."
"This is fine. This is exactly how it should feel."
hand_good_start: The Frowny Clown looks at their dice: "It won't last."
hand_bad_start: The Frowny Clown looks at their dice. They do not seem surprised.
The Frowny Clown sits with their hand for a moment: "Of course."
keep_hand: "I'll keep it. What does it matter."
special_die_self_joker: "A Joker. They find me wherever I go."
"Of course it's smiling. They always smile."
special_die_self_knight: The Frowny Clown stares at the Knight: "High. Uncharacteristically high."
"A Knight. Even I get lucky. Once in a while."
special_die_self_rogue: The Frowny Clown nods at the Rogue: "Yes. That makes sense."
react_good_roll: The Frowny Clown watches your dice: "Enjoy it while it lasts."
react_no_combo: The Frowny Clown nods slowly: "I know that feeling."
react_stand_pat: The Frowny Clown watches: "Standing pat. A quiet kind of courage."
"They're keeping what they have. That's all any of us can do."
community_favor_self: The Frowny Clown looks at the community die and says nothing. They don't trust this.
community_favor_other: The Frowny Clown stares at the community die: "It was never going to be for me."
special_die_community_joker: The Frowny Clown looks at the Joker on the table: "They follow me everywhere."
special_die_community_knight: The Frowny Clown looks at the community Knight: "High card for all. Even I can appreciate that."
special_die_community_rogue: "A Rogue on the table. It finds us everywhere."
special_die_community_bridge: The Frowny Clown stares at the Bridge: "A connector. Things connect. Then they break."
showdown_start: The Frowny Clown is very still: "Show me what you have. I already know how this ends."
The Frowny Clown folds their hands: "The moment of reckoning. It always arrives."
showdown_winning_last: "I didn't expect this. I never expect this."
showdown_weak_last: "It was always going to end this way."
showdown_losing: "I knew it when I looked at them."
showdown_react_best: The Frowny Clown looks at the hand and nods slowly: "Yes. That is how it would go."
showdown_react_good: The Frowny Clown watches: "Not the worst. Not the worst at all."
showdown_react_bad: The Frowny Clown nods: "I know that feeling well."
The Frowny Clown says nothing. They seem to understand.
showdown_npc_win: The Frowny Clown looks at the winning hand for a long time: "As it was always going to be."
showdown_npc_lose: The Frowny Clown looks at you: "You won. Everything ends. Even losing streaks."
The Frowny Clown sits quietly: "It's yours."
showdown_npc_tie: "A tie. Neither of us won. Neither of us truly lost. I find this fitting."
The Frowny Clown considers the tie: "The dice couldn't decide. Neither can I."

game_start: The Serious Clown straightens in their chair.
The Serious Clown places both hands flat on the table.
round_3: The Serious Clown turns to look at you.
reroll: The Serious Clown picks up one die.
keep_hand: The Serious Clown places a hand flat on the table and does not move.
The Serious Clown stares at their dice.
special_die_self_joker: The Serious Clown stares at the Joker for a long moment.
special_die_self_knight: The Serious Clown holds the Knight for a moment before setting it down.
special_die_self_rogue: The Serious Clown places the Rogue precisely.
special_die_self: The Serious Clown tilts their head very slightly.
react_good_roll: The Serious Clown looks at your hand.
react_stand_pat: The Serious Clown makes a note of this.
special_die_community_knight: The Serious Clown looks at the Knight.
special_die_community_rogue: The Serious Clown's eyes move to the Rogue on the table.
special_die_community_bridge: The Serious Clown studies the Bridge.
showdown_start: The Serious Clown folds their hands on the table.
The Serious Clown does not move.
showdown_reveal: The Serious Clown watches you look at their hand.
showdown_leading: The Serious Clown is very still.
showdown_winning_last: The Serious Clown turns to face you directly.
The Serious Clown stands. They do not sit back down.
showdown_weak_last: The Serious Clown does not react.
showdown_losing: The Serious Clown does not react.
showdown_react_best: The Serious Clown's gaze lingers on the hand.
The Serious Clown adjusts their position slightly.
showdown_react_good: The Serious Clown watches the hand.
showdown_npc_win: The Serious Clown picks up their winnings without a word.
The Serious Clown does not celebrate.
showdown_npc_tie: The Serious Clown stares at the tied hands for a long moment.
The Serious Clown sets their dice down and does not stand.
showdown_npc_lose: The Serious Clown sits for a moment. Then they stand. Then, they are gone.

game_start: "OH! IT'S STARTING! IT'S STARTING RIGHT NOW!"
The Surprised Clown looks around the table as if seeing it for the first time: "Oh. OH. I didn't know this was happening TODAY."
round_1: The Surprised Clown slaps both hands on the table: "Oh! Oh! Oh! IT'S TIME!"
The Surprised Clown points at the ceiling.
round_2: The Surprised Clown looks at their hand as if seeing it for the first time: "WHAT? Still? Oh. Oh yes."
The Surprised Clown blinks rapidly: "The community die. Did you — did you see it? It was THERE."
round_3: The Surprised Clown straightens up abruptly: "THE LAST ONE. THIS IS THE LAST ONE."
The Surprised Clown stands, sits, stands again: "Final round. Final round final round final round."
round_good_hand: The Surprised Clown stares at their dice: "Is this — wait — IS THIS GOOD? I THINK THIS IS GOOD!"
"I have — I have a good hand? I have a GOOD HAND!"
round_bad_hand: The Surprised Clown looks at their dice: "Oh. Oh no. When did this happen."
"This is... this is bad. I'm going to be brave about it though."
hand_good_start: The Surprised Clown looks at their dice. Their mouth falls open wider than the mask would suggest.
"Good? Is that — is that good? I CAN'T TELL."
hand_bad_start: The Surprised Clown stares at their dice: "Hm. Hm hm. HM."
The Surprised Clown seems to forget what they were doing.
reroll: "YES! Again! I want to see it AGAIN!"
keep_hand: "I'll keep — I'll keep the — yes. Yes? Yes."
pair_hit: "TWO! They're TWO! What does that MEAN?!"
good_roll: "IS THAT GOOD? SOMEONE TELL ME IF THAT'S GOOD."
no_combo: "It doesn't match. But that's FINE. That's GREAT. That's — okay."
special_die_self_joker: "THE JOKER! THE JOKER IS HERE! HE CAME AGAIN!"
"It's smiling. Why is it smiling at me like that."
special_die_self_knight: "A KNIGHT! A KNIGHT! I LOVE KNIGHTS!"
The Surprised Clown holds up the Knight and stares at it: "You came! You came for me!"
special_die_self_rogue: "A ROGUE! What does a Rogue WANT?! I don't — "
The Surprised Clown stares at the Rogue with genuine concern.
special_die_self: "Oh! Oh no! Oh YES! Oh — oh dear."
react_pair: The Surprised Clown points at your dice: "Wait. WAIT. THEY MATCH! THEY MATCH!"
react_good_roll: The Surprised Clown stares at your hand, then at their own, then at the ceiling.
The Surprised Clown grabs the edge of the table: "That's a LOT — oh."
react_no_combo: The Surprised Clown nods rapidly at nothing in particular.
The Surprised Clown doesn't seem to have noticed.
react_stand_pat: The Surprised Clown stares: "They're KEEPING it? They're just — KEEPING it?"
community_favor_self: The Surprised Clown gasps at the community die: "FOR ME? Is that FOR ME?!"
community_favor_other: The Surprised Clown stares at the community die: "...not mine. That was not mine."
The Surprised Clown points at the community die and then looks away.
special_die_community_joker: The Surprised Clown stands up: "A JOKER ON THE TABLE. A JOKER ON THE — sit down. I am sitting down."
special_die_community_knight: The Surprised Clown points at the Knight: "THE KNIGHT IS ON THE TABLE! HE'S PROTECTING EVERYONE!"
special_die_community_rogue: The Surprised Clown eyes the community Rogue: "That one's on the TABLE now. That one's for EVERYONE."
special_die_community_bridge: "THE BRIDGE! A BRIDGE! ON THE TABLE! FOR EVERYONE!"
special_die_community: The Surprised Clown makes a noise. Not a word. Just a noise.
showdown_start: The Surprised Clown seems to have been surprised by the showdown: "OH. OH IT'S TIME. ALREADY."
The Surprised Clown twitches: "Show. It's the show now. The show part."
showdown_reveal: "Here — here's — look at this. LOOK AT THIS."
showdown_best: "WHAT. WHAT IS HAPPENING. WHY ARE THERE SO MANY."
showdown_winning_last: "I WIN! I — wait. Do I win? I WIN!"
"The last one and it's MINE! IT'S MINE!"
showdown_weak_last: "Oh no. Oh no oh no. That's not enough is it. That's not enough."
"I thought — I always think it's going to be different."
showdown_losing: "That's less. Is that less? That seems like less."
showdown_react_best: The Surprised Clown stands up: "THAT'S — THAT'S A — that's the best one!"
"IT'S IN THE LEAD! IT WENT TO THE FRONT!"
showdown_react_good: The Surprised Clown blinks: "Oh! Oh that's — is that good? That seems good."
showdown_react_bad: The Surprised Clown winces: "Oh. Oh no. But that's okay. That's okay!"
The Surprised Clown pats the table consolingly.
showdown_npc_win: The Surprised Clown looks at the winner: "THEY WON? THEY — when did THEY WIN?"
"Someone won! That person! That person right there won!"
showdown_npc_lose: The Surprised Clown points at you: "YOU WON? YOU — oh. OH! YOU WON!"
The Surprised Clown sits back down in shock: "I didn't see that — well I saw it — but — "
showdown_npc_tie: "A TIE?! A TIE?! HOW?! WHEN?! I DON'T — "
The Surprised Clown looks between the tied hands, genuinely overwhelmed.

game_start: The jaw clicks open. Words come out slow, hollow. "Sit. Play. I have been waiting."
He sets out his dice one by one with careful fingers.
round_1: The skull tilts to one side. Watching.
A dry rattle as he picks up his dice.
round_2: Still. Patient. The dead are good at that.
round_3: A long pause before he picks up his dice. As if thinking.
round_good_hand: The jaw doesn't move. But something changes in his posture.
He sets his dice down with quiet care.
round_bad_hand: He sets the dice down with the same care as always.
He looks at the dice. No expression. There never is.
hand_good_start: He holds his dice loosely. Unhurried.
A rattle of fingers across bone.
hand_bad_start: He looks at his dice for a moment. Nothing on his face. There never is.
reroll: He rolls again without a word.
keep_hand: He sets his dice flat and folds his hands.
He doesn't move. The hand is set.
pair_hit: A rattle that might be satisfaction.
He notes it. Sets the die down with care.
good_roll: He doesn't react. Just notes it.
A hollow sound at the back of his jaw. Not quite a laugh.
no_combo: He looks at the dice. Sets them down again.
special_die_self_joker: The Skull stares back at both of you.
"All roads lead here," he says, tapping the skull face.
special_die_self_knight: He looks at the Knight face without expression. "Old rank."
He tilts his head at the face. Sets it down.
special_die_self_rogue: He examines the Rogue face. Sets it down without comment.
He holds the die up briefly. Nods at it.
special_die_self_bridge: He tilts his head at the Bridge face. Taps it once.
"A bridge," he says quietly. Nothing else.
react_pair: A soft knock of bone on bone.
He moves one die slightly. Lines them up.
react_good_roll: A creak of neck bone. Something like respect.
react_stand_pat: He folds his hands on the stump.
Still. Like he has all the time in the world.
community_favor_self: "The bones favor me." A hollow rattle follows.
He taps the community dice once. Satisfied.
community_favor_other: He looks at the community dice. Then at you. Nods once.
special_die_community_joker: "The skull, there in the middle." He looks at it a long time.
He reaches out and touches the skull face. Doesn't roll it.
special_die_community_knight: He tips his head toward the Knight face. Old recognition.
special_die_community_rogue: He considers the Rogue face with hollow eyes.
He looks at the Rogue face a moment longer than the others.
special_die_community_bridge: "A bridge." He says it quietly. "Useful thing."
He taps the Bridge face once.
showdown_start: Bone fingers press flat on the stone. "Show."
showdown_leading: He looks at your dice. Then his. Says nothing.
He holds still. His hand is ahead.
showdown_best: His hand is good. He knows it.
showdown_winning_last: He hasn't moved. He doesn't need to.
showdown_weak_last: He looks at his dice flatly.
He sets one die down. Studies it.
showdown_losing: He looks from your dice to his. Long pause.
showdown_react_best: He looks from your dice to his. A long pause.
showdown_react_good: "You play well." Not an empty compliment.
He nods once at your dice.
showdown_react_bad: He holds still. Waiting for you to fold.
showdown_win: "The bones decide. Not me." He draws in the coins.
He gathers the pot with unhurried care.
showdown_tie: He divides the pot evenly. Sets your half in front of you without a word.
He counts it out. Exact halves.
showdown_lose: He holds still for a long moment. Then pushes the pot across. "...Play again sometime."
He looks at your hand a while before pushing the winnings over.

special_die_self_priest: The cultist turns up a Priest and doesn't look surprised. "Watch," they say. "The Light doesn't favor a stacked hand — it plainens every die at this table but the one that showed it."
special_die_community_priest: A Priest turns face-up on the table itself. "There," the cultist says. "The Light doesn't play favorites. Every hand at this table loses its tricks the moment it shows."
game_start: The cultist sets three dice in a row, unhurried. "Let's see what the Light reveals."
"Sit," the cultist says, already shuffling their dice. "The Light favors those who show up."
round_2: "The table changes," the cultist murmurs, watching the community die turn face-up.
round_3: "Last round," the cultist says. "The Light has seen enough of us both to decide."
round_good_hand: The cultist's hands go still over their dice. "This will do."
round_bad_hand: The cultist studies their hand without expression. "The Light is testing me, it seems."
hand_good_start: The cultist glances at their dice and says nothing, which is somehow worse.
hand_bad_start: The cultist looks at their dice and exhales slowly. "As expected."
reroll: "Again," the cultist says. "The Light rewards those who ask twice."
keep_hand: "This is enough," the cultist says, folding their hands over the dice.
pair_hit: "There," the cultist says quietly. "The Light provides."
good_roll: The cultist studies the roll and nods once, to no one.
no_combo: "Nothing," the cultist says, unbothered. "The Light gives what it gives."
react_pair: The cultist's eyes move to your matched dice. "Fortunate."
react_good_roll: The cultist studies your hand for a long moment. "The Light is generous with you today."
react_no_combo: The cultist watches you come up empty and says nothing at all.
react_stand_pat: "Holding," the cultist notes. "Confidence, or surrender. The Light doesn't distinguish."
community_favor_self: The cultist glances at the table. "The Light provides for the patient."
community_favor_other: The cultist's expression doesn't change. "That one wasn't for me."
showdown_start: The cultist sets their hands flat on the stone. "Show what the Light has given you."
showdown_reveal: "Here," the cultist says, laying out their hand.
showdown_best: The cultist looks at their own hand for a moment, almost surprised. "The Light is generous today."
showdown_winning_last: The cultist doesn't move to collect the pot right away. "As it should be."
showdown_weak_last: "It seems the Light had other plans," the cultist says, unbothered.
showdown_losing: The cultist studies your hand without visible disappointment. "So be it."
showdown_react_best: The cultist studies your hand a long moment. "That's a hand worth remembering."
showdown_react_bad: The cultist says nothing, which somehow reads as kindness.
showdown_win: The cultist gathers the coins with quiet certainty. "The Light provides for those who trust it."
showdown_tie: The cultist divides the pot evenly, without comment. "The Light is patient today."
showdown_lose: The cultist slides the coins across without complaint. "The Light provided. Not for me, this time."
